name: orchestrator
summary: The loop driver (scheduler). Runs one signal through extract → classify → estimate → dispatch → terminal outcome (completed|unknown|failed), opening a span per hop and recording every step via loop-store. Dispatches ONLY to real handlers; an unknown target becomes an explicit 'unknown' — it can never fake an agent call.

admission.note: Candidate. NOT in harness/manifest.json and NOT admitted. Promotion is a human step.

output.description: The full traced run + human feedback lines.

exit: Records exactly one terminal run outcome (completed|unknown|failed) — never open, never silent.
invariants: Every run ends in exactly one terminal outcome: completed | unknown | failed.
Dispatch goes only to a real handler in the table; an unrecognised target is 'unknown' (no ghost dispatch).
Every hop is one span on one trace; every recorded row carries the four-tuple.
The classifier scores the signal, the estimator scores the work, the orchestrator routes — separated.
